name: aviation_security_model_based_triage_tool_redwood_lib_eq
premise: A Aviation Security response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving aviation security model based triage tool redwood lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Fatima Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Fatima Alvarez, accountable for a defensible call in Aviation Security when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Ansel Patel
agents.identity: I am Ansel Patel, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Aviation Security.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Fatima Alvarez must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Fatima Alvarez do?
